name: RNA-seq Library Preparation (PolyA Selection)

note.en: trizol_extraction or rna_column_extraction. Bioanalyzer RIN ≥7.0 (≥8 preferred). Nanodrop: A260/280 ≥2.0, A260/230 ≥1.8. Qubit RNA HS for accurate quantification.
note.zh: trizol_extraction 或 rna_column_extraction。Bioanalyzer RIN ≥7.0（≥8 优选）。Nanodrop：A260/280 ≥2.0、A260/230 ≥1.8。Qubit RNA HS 精确定量。

components.name: 2. Input: 100 ng–1 µg total RNA (optimal 500 ng)

note.en: Degraded RNA: use RiboZero rRNA depletion instead of polyA. Single-cell: 10× Chromium or Smart-seq2.
note.zh: 降解 RNA：用 RiboZero rRNA 去除替代 polyA。单细胞：10× Chromium 或 Smart-seq2。

components.name: 3. PolyA selection: oligo-dT magnetic beads, 65°C 5 min → RT 5 min → wash × 2 → elute 80°C 2 min; repeat once

note.en: 2× binding buffer: 10 mM Tris pH 7.5, 500 mM LiCl, 1 mM EDTA. Double selection reduces rRNA contamination to <5%.
note.zh: 2× 结合缓冲液：10 mM Tris pH 7.5、500 mM LiCl、1 mM EDTA。双次选择将 rRNA 污染降至 <5%。

components.name: 4. Fragmentation: 94°C, 2–8 min in First Strand Buffer

note.en: Target 150–300 bp inserts for Illumina short-read. Stop with 0.5 M EDTA. 2 min → ~300 bp; 8 min → ~130 bp.
note.zh: 目标片段 150–300 bp（Illumina 短读）。0.5 M EDTA 终止。2 min → ~300 bp；8 min → ~130 bp。

components.name: 5. First-strand cDNA: random hexamers + RT (SuperScript III/IV)

note.en: 65°C 5 min (denature) → ice 1 min → add RT mix (1× FS Buffer, 5 mM DTT, RNaseOUT, RT enzyme) → 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min → RNase H 37°C 20 min.
note.zh: 65°C 5 min（变性）→ 冰 1 min → 加 RT 混合物（1× FS 缓冲液、5 mM DTT、RNaseOUT、逆转录酶）→ 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min → RNase H 37°C 20 min。

components.name: 6. Second-strand cDNA: DNA Pol I + E. coli ligase + RNase H, 16°C 2.5 h

note.en: For strand-specific: replace dTTP with dUTP. Purify with 1.8× AMPure XP (SPRI) beads.
note.zh: 链特异性建库：将 dTTP 替换为 dUTP。1.8× AMPure XP（SPRI）磁珠纯化。

note.en: End repair: T4 DNA Pol + T4 PNK + Klenow, 30°C 30 min. dA-tailing: Klenow (exo-), 37°C 30 min. Purify 1× AMPure XP.
note.zh: 末端修复：T4 DNA Pol + T4 PNK + Klenow，30°C 30 min。加 A 尾：Klenow（exo-），37°C 30 min。1× AMPure XP 纯化。

components.name: 8. Adapter ligation: dual-index Y-adapters, T4 ligase, RT 15 min

note.en: Adapter:insert 10:1 molar. Heat inactivate 65°C 10 min. Size select: 0.8× then 0.2× AMPure XP (removes adapter-dimers at ~130 bp).
note.zh: 接头:插入片段 10:1 摩尔比。65°C 10 min 灭活。双面选择：0.8× + 0.2× AMPure XP（去除 ~130 bp 接头二聚体）。

note.en: 8 cycles for 500 ng input; 12–14 for <100 ng. KAPA HiFi or Q5 polymerase. 1× AMPure XP cleanup.
note.zh: 500 ng 投入量 8 个循环；<100 ng 用 12–14 个循环。KAPA HiFi 或 Q5 聚合酶。1× AMPure XP 纯化。

note.en: Expect ~280–350 bp (insert + adapters). No adapter-dimer (<1% at 130 bp). Qubit dsDNA HS + NEBNext Library Quant qPCR. Sequence: 20–50 M 150 bp PE reads/sample.
note.zh: 预期 ~280–350 bp（插入片段 + 接头）。无接头二聚体（130 bp 处 <1%）。Qubit dsDNA HS + NEBNext Library Quant qPCR 定量。测序：每样品 2,000–5,000 万条 150 bp PE reads。

notes.en: Strand-specific: replace dTTP with dUTP, then UNG digest before PCR → preserves strand info. Low input (<10 ng): Smart-seq2 or NEBNext Single Cell. rRNA depletion (RiboZero) for degraded RNA or non-polyA transcripts (lncRNA, histone mRNA).
notes.zh: 链特异性：第二链合成 dTTP→dUTP，PCR 前 UNG 酶切 → 保留链信息。低投入（<10 ng）：Smart-seq2 或 NEBNext Single Cell。降解 RNA 或非 polyA 转录本：RiboZero rRNA 去除。

ref: Illumina TruSeq Stranded mRNA Reference Guide 15031047; Adiconis et al. (2013) Nat Methods 10:623–629

materials.name: mRNA enrichment beads (poly-dT) or rRNA depletion kit
End repair, A-tailing, and adapter ligation reagents
PCR master mix for library amplification

usage.en: Prepare strand-specific RNA-seq libraries for next-generation sequencing.
usage.zh: 链特异性 RNA-seq 文库构建，用于下一代测序。

briefSteps.en: QC total RNA (RIN ≥7) → polyA select with oligo-dT beads → fragment mRNA at 94°C → reverse transcribe to first-strand cDNA → second-strand synthesis → end repair + dA-tail → ligate dual-index adapters → size select with AMPure XP → PCR amplify 8–14 cycles → QC library by Bioanalyzer and qPCR.
briefSteps.zh: 总 RNA 质检（RIN ≥7）→ oligo-dT 磁珠 polyA 富集 → 94°C 热片段化 → 逆转录为第一链 cDNA → 第二链合成 → 末端修复加 A 尾 → 连接双索引接头 → AMPure XP 筛选 → PCR 扩增 8–14 个循环 → Bioanalyzer 和 qPCR 质检文库。

detailedSteps.en: Assess RNA quality by Bioanalyzer or TapeStation (RIN ≥7.0, ideally ≥8.0). Quantify with Qubit RNA HS assay. Input: 100 ng – 1 µg total RNA in ≤10 µL RNase-free water.
detailedSteps.zh: Bioanalyzer 或 TapeStation 评估 RNA 质量（RIN ≥7.0，理想 ≥8.0）。Qubit RNA HS 定量。投入量：100 ng–1 µg 总 RNA，溶于 ≤10 µL 无 RNase 水中。

detailedSteps.en: PolyA mRNA selection: incubate RNA with oligo-dT magnetic beads in 2× binding buffer (10 mM Tris pH 7.5, 500 mM LiCl, 1 mM EDTA) at 65°C for 5 min, cool to RT 5 min, wash beads twice, elute at 80°C for 2 min. Repeat selection once to reduce rRNA to <5%.
detailedSteps.zh: PolyA mRNA 富集：在 2× 结合缓冲液（10 mM Tris pH 7.5、500 mM LiCl、1 mM EDTA）中将 RNA 与 oligo-dT 磁珠 65°C 孵育 5 min，室温冷却 5 min，洗涤磁珠两次，80°C 洗脱 2 min。重复一次以将 rRNA 降至 <5%。

detailedSteps.en: Fragment enriched mRNA by heating in First Strand Buffer at 94°C for 2–8 min (2 min → ~300 bp; 8 min → ~130 bp; target 200–300 bp for standard library). Immediately stop with 0.5 M EDTA and place on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 在第一链缓冲液中 94°C 加热 2–8 min 片段化富集后的 mRNA（2 min → ~300 bp；8 min → ~130 bp；标准建库目标 200–300 bp）。立即用 0.5 M EDTA 终止并置冰上。

detailedSteps.en: First-strand cDNA synthesis: add random hexamers, denature at 65°C for 5 min, snap cool on ice 1 min. Add RT mix (1× First Strand Buffer, 5 mM DTT, 40 U RNaseOUT, SuperScript III/IV). Incubate: 25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min. Add RNase H (2 U) and incubate 37°C 20 min to remove RNA template.
detailedSteps.zh: 第一链 cDNA 合成：加入随机六聚体引物，65°C 变性 5 min，冰上快速冷却 1 min。加入 RT 混合物（1× 第一链缓冲液、5 mM DTT、40 U RNaseOUT、SuperScript III/IV）。孵育：25°C 10 min → 50°C 50 min → 70°C 15 min。加 RNase H（2 U），37°C 20 min 去除 RNA 模板。

detailedSteps.en: Second-strand cDNA synthesis: add second-strand reaction mix containing DNA Pol I (10 U), E. coli DNA ligase (10 U), and RNase H (2 U) in Second Strand Buffer. Incubate at 16°C for 2.5 h. For strand-specific libraries, use dUTP instead of dTTP. Purify with 1.8× AMPure XP beads.
detailedSteps.zh: 第二链 cDNA 合成：加入含 DNA Pol I（10 U）、大肠杆菌 DNA 连接酶（10 U）和 RNase H（2 U）的第二链反应混合物。16°C 孵育 2.5 h。链特异性建库将 dTTP 替换为 dUTP。1.8× AMPure XP 磁珠纯化。

detailedSteps.en: End repair and dA-tailing: incubate ds-cDNA with T4 DNA Polymerase, T4 PNK, and Klenow fragment in end-repair buffer at 30°C for 30 min. Then add dATP and Klenow (exo-) and incubate at 37°C for 30 min to add 3′ A overhang. Purify with 1× AMPure XP beads.
detailedSteps.zh: 末端修复与加 A 尾：将双链 cDNA 与 T4 DNA 聚合酶、T4 PNK 和 Klenow 片段在末端修复缓冲液中 30°C 孵育 30 min。加入 dATP 和 Klenow（exo-），37°C 孵育 30 min 添加 3′ A 突出端。1× AMPure XP 磁珠纯化。

detailedSteps.en: Adapter ligation: ligate dual-index Y-shaped adapters (10:1 molar adapter:insert ratio) with T4 DNA Ligase at room temperature for 15 min. Heat-inactivate at 65°C for 10 min. Size-select with double-sided AMPure XP (0.8× then add 0.2× to supernatant) to remove adapter-dimers (~130 bp) and retain 200–500 bp inserts.
detailedSteps.zh: 接头连接：双索引 Y 形接头与插入片段以 10:1 摩尔比用 T4 DNA 连接酶室温连接 15 min。65°C 热灭活 10 min。双面 AMPure XP 筛选（先 0.8×，再向上清中加 0.2×）去除接头二聚体（~130 bp），保留 200–500 bp 插入片段。

detailedSteps.en: PCR library amplification: 98°C 30 s initial denaturation → [98°C 10 s, 60°C 30 s, 72°C 30 s] × 8–14 cycles → 72°C 5 min final extension. Use 8 cycles for 500 ng input and 12–14 cycles for <100 ng. Use KAPA HiFi or Q5 high-fidelity polymerase. Purify with 1× AMPure XP beads.
detailedSteps.zh: PCR 文库扩增：98°C 30 s 预变性 → [98°C 10 s、60°C 30 s、72°C 30 s] × 8–14 循环 → 72°C 5 min 末端延伸。500 ng 投入量用 8 个循环，<100 ng 用 12–14 个循环。使用 KAPA HiFi 或 Q5 高保真聚合酶。1× AMPure XP 磁珠纯化。

detailedSteps.en: Library QC: verify size distribution on Bioanalyzer or TapeStation (expected peak 280–350 bp). Confirm absence of adapter-dimers (<1% at 130 bp). Quantify by Qubit dsDNA HS and NEBNext Library Quant qPCR. Pool samples at equimolar ratio and sequence at 20–50 M paired-end 150 bp reads per sample.
detailedSteps.zh: 文库质检：Bioanalyzer 或 TapeStation 验证片段分布（预期主峰 280–350 bp）。确认无接头二聚体（130 bp 处 <1%）。Qubit dsDNA HS 和 NEBNext Library Quant qPCR 定量。等摩尔混样，每样品测序 2,000–5,000 万条 150 bp PE reads。

note.en: First-strand cDNA can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 week before proceeding to second-strand synthesis.
note.zh: 第一链 cDNA 可在 −20°C 保存最多 1 周，之后再进行第二链合成。

note.en: Adapter-ligated, size-selected library can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 month before PCR amplification.
note.zh: 连接接头并筛选大小后的文库可在 −20°C 保存最多 1 个月，之后再进行 PCR 扩增。

note.en: Final PCR-amplified library can be stored at −20°C for up to 12 months. Verify quality before submitting for sequencing.
note.zh: 最终 PCR 扩增文库可在 −20°C 保存最多 12 个月。送测序前务必验证质量。
